necessityProof.blockerResolved: N1 still had three shard-readiness archive verification renderers with repeated markdown skeletons and repeated archive-reference line helpers.
necessityProof.laterConsumer: N5 Phase-B service/renderer folding can now inspect shard-readiness renderers as compact report specs instead of long hand-written markdown arrays.
necessityProof.reuseDecision: The v2114 report builder and v2123 archive-reference helper cover the common title/meta/section/archive-reference shape. The live-read observation formatter remains local because it is specific to Java and mini-kv archived read observations.
necessityProof.growthStopCondition: The batch stops at shard-readiness archive verification. Runtime execution pass evidence and fake transport packet renderers remain separate because their helper shapes and safety narratives differ.

focusedRendererBatch.command: npx vitest run test/verificationReportBuilder.test.ts test/governanceGrowthRatchet.test.ts and 3 shard-readiness archive verification test files --testTimeout=180000

byteIdenticalCompare.method: Temporary Vitest test loaded legacy renderer source from git HEAD, rewired imports to current source modules, loaded real archive profiles, and asserted equality with each migrated renderer output.

lint.note: Warnings are the existing v2115 baseline and are outside this renderer-consolidation batch.

archiveDeliverables: 代码讲解记录_生产雏形阶段3/r2000/2096-renderer-consolidation-batch-8-v2125.md

crossProjectParallel.reason: v2125 only changes Node markdown rendering for frozen shard-readiness archive profiles; it does not request fresh sibling evidence, live integration, upstream service startup, or schema changes.
